properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Your light broke through my night Restored exceeding joy Your grace fell like the rain And made this desert live

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You have turned my mourning into dancing You have turned my sorrow into joy

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your hand lifted me up I stand on higher ground Your praise rose in my heart And made this valley sing

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You have turned my mourning into dancing You have turned my sorrow into joy You have turned my mourning into dancing You have turned my sorrow into joy
